S.FORM: Benoit Benjamin sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1964, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 11, Benoit Benjamin, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' ryax qnxan nqu Benoit Benjamin sa senmung pgnawgan mari'. min 1581 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ОІenoit ОІenjamin s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa, wal malaxmis~Й•uq qanij la. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj ** nqu taj **, ОІenoit ОІenjamin, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. pinКҰ~КЁjuwaЙЈan njaК” rjax qnxan nqu ОІenoit ОІenjamin s~Й•a s~Й•enmuЕӢ pЙЈnawЙЈan mariК”. min **** zniЕӢat njaК” mariК”zik na ttkran mariК”. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
